title: pyrus favargeri
intro: Pyrus favargeri, also known as the Korean wild apple or Korean mountain apple, is a species of flowering plant in the rose family (Rosaceae). It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Pyrus favargeri include its ability to aid in digestion, reduce fever, and alleviate symptoms of respiratory infections. Pyrus favargeri is typically prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or decoctions, and is also used in traditional Korean folk medicine to treat various ailments.
